claims.claim_title: Chronic Mild Metabolic / White Matter Dominant
claims.claim_text: This is the packet most likely to turn chronic mild TBI from a symptom bucket into a mechanistically distinct endotype with a different perturbation bias.
claims.allowed_language: Use cohort-language as suggestive context only, not as a locked endotype claim.

keep axonal and vascular alternatives visible.
evidence_gaps: The packet still needs stronger direct chronic metabolomic and transcriptomic cohort anchors.

claims.claim_text: This is the best packet for tying severe diffuse injury to the downstream cognitive and network phenotype rather than stopping at acute severity labels.
claims.allowed_language: Use cohort-language as suggestive context only, not as a locked endotype claim.
contradiction_notes: Chronic severe cohorts often mix irreversible structural burden with still-perturbable metabolic pressure, so a single-label interpretation will overstate certainty.
evidence_gaps: The current packet needs stronger biomarker plus longitudinal-function linkages.
